sglang.title: Fix missing additional_stop_token_ids
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt: There are some places where we do not attach additional_stop_token_ids. This PR fixes it.

Motivation

Modifications

Checklist

 Format your code according to the Contributor Guide.

sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt: To make the CI more reliable.

sglang.title: Fix the perf regression due to additional_stop_token_ids
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
#1766 introduced a pref regression on the test
python3 -m unittest test_bench_serving.TestBenchServing.test_online_latency_default

This PR fixed it.

vllm.title: [VLM] Post-layernorm override and quant config in vision encoder
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Also, QuantizationConfig and associated prefix argument is now passed to vision towers to maintain consistency. Nevertheless, since vision tower is not quantized by existing methods yet, we ignore it and add a code comment explaining this.
FIX #9186

vllm.title: [Model] Add min_pixels / max_pixels to Qwen2VL as mm_processor_kwargs
vllm.author: alex-jw-brooks
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #9545
This PR:

Adds support for passing min_pixels / max_pixels as mm_processor_kwargs for Qwen2VL
Updates the single image to show usage of min_pixels / max_pixels

Example usage for reference (mm_processor_kwargs can be passed at init time or inference time):
from vllm import LLM, SamplingPar

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix `_init_vision_model` in NVLM_D model
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Oops, just realized that #9217 and #9528 break NVLM_D model. This PR fixes the issue.

vllm.title: [misc] comment to avoid future confusion about baichuan
vllm.author: youkaichao

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix divide by zero when serving Mamba models
vllm.author: tlrmchlsmth
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
num_total_gpu ends up being 0 for attention-free models, which results in a divide-by-zero in llm_engine.py when running:
vllm serve tiiuae/falcon-mamba-7b-instruct

We're already guarding against None here so this guards against zero as well.
I also tried setting num_gpu_blocks to None in determine

vllm.title: [Misc] Separate total and output tokens in benchmark_throughput.py
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Also added --max-num-seqs as an argument to benchmarks/benchmark_throughput.py
Before:
Throughput: 81.74 requests/s, 20926.37 tokens/s

After:
Throughput: 89.27 requests/s, 22853.37 total tokens/s, 11426.69 output tokens/s

vllm.title: [torch.compile] Adding torch compile annotations to some models
vllm.author: CRZbulabula
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR is to improve #9589, adding annotations and testing them.

vllm.title: [Frontend] Enable Online Multi-image Support for MLlama
vllm.author: alex-jw-brooks
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Currently, there is some special handling for mllama in the chat utils that result in only one image placeholder being used when multiple images are added. Now that #9095 added multi-image / interleaved data support, I think this can be removed to handle image placeholders normally for mllama in the

vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adding support for Qwen2-Audio model.
FIX #8394

Requirements
Use transformers>=4.45.1, and please install vLLM from source.
Example Usage
import requests


from transformers import AutoTokenizer, AutoProcessor
from transformers.pipelines.audio_utils import ffmpeg_read

from vllm im

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Add bot to close stale issues and PRs

This PR adds configuration to run the actions/stale github
action that closes stale issues and PRs.
Further discussion is on the issue.
Closes #9435
Signed-off-by: Russell Bryant rbryant@redhat.com

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Model] Fix Mllama SDPA illegal memory access for batched multi-image
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Mllama could trigger a CUDA error for illegal memory access within the cross-attention SDPA during inference or even profile run when running batch multi-image requests.
When inspecting the inputs to the SDPA, I noticed that the Q/K/V states were not contiguous in all cases (attention_mask is contig

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Use "vision_model" prefix for MllamaVisionModel
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
#9217 introduced quant_config and prefix names to many vision encoders, but for Mllama the base MllamaVisionModel instantiation was missing the "vision_model" prefix.
This broke a previously runnable FP8 checkpoint because the should_ignore_layer function was getting layer names that did not match t

vllm.title: [XPU] avoid triton import for xpu
vllm.author: yma11
vllm.bodyExcerpt: avoid triton import for xpu as we don't take triton as dependency.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix PP for ChatGLM and Molmo, and weight loading for Qwen2.5-Math-RM
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
#9242 accidentally removed PP support from ChatGLM. On the other hand, MolmoModel already supports PP but the top-level MolmoForCausalLM does not. This PR fixes both of these issues.
The input processors of these models and Qwen2-VL have also been cleaned up a bit.
Also fixes #9090 (comment)

vllm.title: [V1][Bugfix] Clean up requests when aborted
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR fixes a bug in V1 that the request is not correctly freed when it is aborted.
